inventory.business_description: `dbo.customers` sits in the CRM portfolio; log activity (~1640 qualifying queries) indicates how tightly coupled downstream reporting and operations are to this object. Recommend prioritizing it in the CRM wave with explicit regression tests on consuming dashboards and batch jobs that reference this table.

`finance.invoices` sits in the Finance portfolio; log activity (~3394 qualifying queries) indicates how tightly coupled downstream reporting and operations are to this object. Documented context: Posted AR invoices; downstream to GL subledger and collections. — validate against source-of-truth owners before locking cutover scope.
inventory.table_comment: Posted AR invoices; downstream to GL subledger and collections.

inventory.business_description: `finance.payments` sits in the Finance portfolio; log activity (~1689 qualifying queries) indicates how tightly coupled downstream reporting and operations are to this object. Documented context: Cash application against invoices; treasury reconciliation. — validate against source-of-truth owners before locking cutover scope.
inventory.table_comment: Cash application against invoices; treasury reconciliation.

inventory.business_description: `legacy_hebrew.חשבוניות` sits in the Legacy Core portfolio; log activity (~1574 qualifying queries) indicates how tightly coupled downstream reporting and operations are to this object. Documented context: Legacy Hebrew billing system; invoices mirrored into finance.invoices. — validate against source-of-truth owners before locking cutover scope.
inventory.table_comment: Legacy Hebrew billing system; invoices mirrored into finance.invoices.

inventory.business_description: `logistics.shipments` sits in the Logistics portfolio; log activity (~1727 qualifying queries) indicates how tightly coupled downstream reporting and operations are to this object. Documented context: Fulfillment and carrier tracking; WMS integration. — validate against source-of-truth owners before locking cutover scope.
inventory.table_comment: Fulfillment and carrier tracking; WMS integration.

domain_matrix.narrative: Finance spans 2 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.

Operations spans 2 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.

Logistics spans 1 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.

CRM spans 1 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.

Legacy Core spans 1 tables across 1 schema(s). Relative business weight (from log activity) is high when importance is high; complexity reflects legacy Hebrew identifiers, cross-schema joins, and ephemeral objects.
Technical Debt groups 1 low-trust or ephemeral tables. Collapse or defer these until core domains are stable.

payload.text: Six mapped DDL tables + legacy_hebrew.חשבוניות + temp_junk.Tmp_staging in scope.
Cutover plan: dbo.orders must land before finance.invoices — finance depends on order_id.
Hebrew invoice bridge SQL references legacy_hebrew.חשבוניות LEFT JOIN finance.invoices.
